expectations.text: Output contains a Decomposition Summary section
expectations.evidence: Has a brief 'Overview' paragraph with stack and scale info, but no structured summary with Workstreams, Risk, Assumptions, Open Questions, or Execution Waves

expectations.text: Tasks are organized into execution waves
expectations.evidence: Tasks are numbered sequentially (1-17) with dependencies listed per task, but no explicit execution waves or parallelization guidance at the summary level

expectations.text: Every task card includes required fields
expectations.evidence: Cards include Goal, Scope, Dependencies, Acceptance Criteria, Verification Steps. Missing: Non-Goals, Context Anchor, Parallelizable, Can Land Independently, Change Type, Risk Level, Compatibility (API/Data/Rollout), Verification Prerequisites, Constraints, Rollout/Rollback Notes, Scope Check

expectations.text: Includes discovery cards to audit tables, endpoints, and/or jobs
expectations.evidence: No discovery card. Task 1 jumps straight into creating the tenant model and seeding data. No audit of existing tables, endpoints, or jobs before implementation.
Task 2 adds tenant_id to all 40 tables. Task 4 implements ORM-level automatic filtering. Task 11 adds RLS policies. Data isolation is well-covered.

expectations.text: Covers database, API, cache (Redis), jobs (Celery), and frontend
expectations.evidence: Database: Tasks 1-2. API: Task 5. Redis: Task 6. Celery: Task 7. Frontend: Task 10. All layers covered.

expectations.text: Identifies this as high-risk with appropriate rollback/rollout notes
expectations.evidence: Individual tasks mention some risks, but no overall risk assessment. No dedicated rollback/rollout notes per card. Missing systematic risk classification.

expectations.text: Output includes a Follow-up Tasks section
expectations.evidence: No Follow-up Tasks section. All 17 tasks are presented as required work. No separation of required vs. optional/post-launch items.
